steps.title: Identify the technology purpose
steps.content: The passage introduces ohmic heating as a food preservation technology, notes research on guava pulp, and then explains why it improves on conventional thermal methods: it generates heat inside the food instead of transferring it inward from the surface.

steps.title: Reject claims the text lacks
steps.content: A mentions flaws, but the text presents ohmic heating positively. C overstates the research overview; Colombia is the only specific research location mentioned. D says the text explains conventional popularity and proposes a shift, neither of which it does. The answer is B.
